name: Frisco Stretchy Dog & Cat Fleece Vest
description: A fleece vest makes a great addition to anyone’s cold-weather wardrobe, even your pet! These cozy, polyester fleece vests are made of stretchy fabric, and they’re thin enough to work as a layering piece and just warm enough to work as a standalone vest if your dog only needs a light layer to stay comfy during cold weather. Made with a pullover design, so it’s easy to put on and always keeps your pet cozy.
